content.en:
Although Ye Tian currently has three perfect-level ancestral endowments, he is still not satisfied, and wants to copy more perfect-level ancestral endowments.

"Go and copy the other perfect-level ancestors. "

Ye Tian decided.

Then, he came to the Land of the Blood Sun outside the Ruins of Eternity.

The Land of the Blood Sun is not an ordinary place, it is an absolute forbidden place for many Eternal Masters, because the Land of the Blood Sun is filled with a terrifying force called the Power of the Blood Sun, and once the ordinary Eternal Masters enter the Power of the Blood Sun, their bodies will be incinerated into ashes by the Power of the Blood Sun.

Without the strength of the Nine Realms level controller or above, it is impossible to survive in the Land of Blood Sun.

However, the Ten Sacred Birds can easily survive in the Land of the Blood Sun, which is like a paradise for them.

Therefore, in the Land of Blood Sun, even a Ten Realm-level controller would hardly be able to beat the Ten Shouwu that was comparable to a Ten Realm-level controller.

Of course, there were still many Ten Realm-level Eternal Masters who dared to enter the Land of the Blood Sun.

There is a very scarce resource in the Land of Blood Sun, called Blood Yang Golden Grass, which helps to refine the body of control.

However, the primordial-level control body in the Origin Realm Sea was not called this name in the Eternal Ruins, after all, it was the name given by the Primordial Ancestor.

In the Ruins of Eternity, such a body of control is called a body of half-step perfect mastery.

If there is enough Blood Yang Golden Grass, it can even raise the body of half-step perfect control to the extreme.

However, the Blood Yang Golden Grass could not help the half-step perfectly controlled body to the level of a perfectly controlled body, so it could not attract those top half-step perfect controllers, nor could it attract perfect masters.

But there are too many eternal masters and half-step perfect masters of the Eternal Ruins, so there are many, many strong people who come here.

Along the way, Ye Tian had encountered many Ten Realm-level controllers and half-step perfect controllers.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the Land of Blood Yang.

As a ten-realm-level controller who was enough to compete with a half-step perfect controller, after Ye Tian entered the Land of Blood Sun, although he was also suppressed by some strength, the impact was not too great.

There are many powerful creatures in the Land of the Blood Sun, and the Ten Sacred Ones are the most famous and powerful of them.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian searched for the traces of the Ten Crows in the Land of the Blood Sun, and occasionally encountered other powerful lifeforms, but he didn't fight with them, and tried to avoid them.

"According to the intelligence information, there should be a lot of ten custodles in the Land of the Blood Sun, so I should be able to easily find the ten shouwu!" Ye Tian muttered.

Sure enough, how long did Ye Tianhua use his copying talent to perceive the ten shouwu.

"Hey, there are actually two perfect level ancestral endowments in the Ten Shou Wu!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Moreover, these two perfection-level ancestral endowments did not coincide with his three perfection-level ancestral endowments.

【Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu: Burning Sun】

【Perfect Ancestral Endowment: Escape the Light】

Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment Blazing Sun belongs to the Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment of the Fire type, while Escape Light belongs to the Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment of the Speed Category.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

Ye Tian copied all of these two perfect-level ancestral endowments in an instant.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was constantly looking for traces of the Ten Shou Wu in the Land of Blood and Sun, and once he encountered it, he would directly copy the perfect level ancestral endowment of these Ten Shou Wu.

this day.

Ye Tian no longer looked for the Ten Shou Wu, and left the Land of the Blood Sun directly.

Subsequently, after he returned to Tai Ying City, he directly began to fuse the two perfect level ancestral endowments of Burning Sun and Escape Light.

Soon, these two perfect-level ancestral endowments were successfully fused.

"The nameless kun is not easy to find, so I won't look for it first, with these five perfect-level ancestral endowments, my growth rate will be very fast, let's create a few more perfect-level control skills first!"

Ye Tian planned.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to cultivate penance, creating perfect control techniques.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also constantly learning about the Eternal Ruins, exchanging some of the resources on his body for treasures suitable for improving the body of control and the will of the Transformation Realm.

However, he is still not rich enough, so he can't exchange many resources for a short time to improve himself.

Time passed slowly, and before you knew it, millions of years had passed.

In the Ruins of Eternity, the longer unit of time is the eternal year.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, an eternal year is equivalent to about one million realm river years.

Thus.

Ye Tian's retreat this time was only equivalent to a few eternal years that had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created another perfect control technique.

This perfect mastery technique was named the Devouring Domain by him, and it was created with the help of the Devouring Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu, which can devour all things and enhance the body of control and physical fitness, thereby improving strength.

In other words, this perfect control body can make Ye Tian's physical fitness extremely powerful, and the control body is getting stronger and stronger, and it is a perfect control technique to assist cultivation.

Of course, the Devouring Domain can also be used in battle, once the Devouring Domain is formed, it is the power to devour the enemy, suppress the enemy's strength, and for Ruo, it is completely slaughter.

After creating the Devouring Domain, Ye Tian's strength also increased a little.

And at this time, Ye Tian also felt that he was very close to the half-step perfect controller.

In the Ruins of Eternity, there are criteria for whether or not a person is a half-step perfect master, such as the body of control has reached the level of a half-step perfect mastery body, or the will has reached the half-step perfect control body.

When one of these two is achieved, it is the half-step perfect master.

And although Ye Tian's combat power was terrifying, neither his body nor his will had reached the half-step perfection level.

"According to the current situation, the standard for each person to achieve a half-step perfect control body or half-step perfect will is different, but the higher the potential, the more difficult it is to become a half-step perfect master, but once it breaks through, the strength will far exceed that of ordinary half-step perfect masters!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, he was not in a hurry to impact the half-step Perfect Controller realm.

this day.

Master Venerable Ten Elements Ancestor came to find Ye Tian.

"Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian'er, I heard that a top force is about to recruit members. There is almost no shortage of members in such top forces, and it will only be recruited once in a long time, so this is an opportunity. Ten Xing Ancestor said excitedly.

"Oh, which force?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Daoless Tower!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"Wudao Tower, it turned out to be this ancient force!"

Ye Tian is not a novice who doesn't know anything when he first comes to the Eternal Ruins, he also has an understanding of the Eternal Ruins now.

Forces like the Azure Pavilion can only be ranked in the third tier in the Ruins of Eternity, and the Daoless Tower is undoubtedly the first rank and one of the nine most powerful forces in the Ruins of Eternity.

The requirements for recruiting members of the Daoless Tower are very strict, and there are even perfect controllers who want to join the Daoless Tower, but the Daoless Tower does not want it.

As for how powerful the Wudao Tower was, Ye Tian didn't know, but it was absolutely terrifying, far surpassing forces like the Azure Pavilion.

"Master, do you want to participate in the assessment of the Daoless Tower?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I'm going to try it, but I guess there's no hope!" Ten Elements Ancestor said, "However, even if I can't enter the Daoless Tower, I have other goals." "

Subsequently, Ye Tian and the Ten Elements Ancestor continued to learn about the Wudao Tower, such as the assessment of the recruited members of the Wudao Tower, but the requirements for each assessment were different, so there was no reference significance.

Finally, after waiting for a period of time, the assessment of the Daoless Tower is about to begin, and the place of assessment is the Distanceless City under the command of the Wudao Tower.

And Ye Tian, the Ten Elements Ancestor, and the Black Decay Controller all came to the Boundless City and signed up for the member assessment of the Pathless Tower.
